quran.text: Jo log apna maal Allah ki raah mein kharch karte hain, unki misaal us daane jaisi hai jisse saat baaliyan ugein aur har baali mein sau daane hon. Aur Allah jiske liye chahta hai, (uske ajr ko) badha deta hai. Aur Allah bahut vus'at wala, sab kuch jaanne wala hai.
Aur Allah ki raah mein kharch karo aur apne haathon se khud ko halakat mein na daalo. Aur neki karo; beshak Allah neki karne walon se muhabbat karta hai.
Tum hargiz neki ko nahi pa sakoge jab tak ke tum apni pasandeeda cheezon mein se kharch na karo. Aur jo kuch bhi tum kharch karte ho, beshak Allah usse khoob waqif hai.
Aur woh (Allah ki) muhabbat mein miskeen, yateem aur qaidi ko khana khilate hain, (kehte hain) 'Hum tumhe sirf Allah ki raza ke liye khilate hain. Hum tumse na koi badla chahte hain aur na shukriya.'
Aur namaz qayam karo aur zakat do, aur jo kuch neki tum apne liye aage bhejoge, use Allah ke paas paoge. Beshak, jo kuch tum karte ho, Allah use dekh raha hai.
To jo shakhs zarra barabar bhi neki karega, woh use dekh lega.
Aur unke maal mein maangne wale aur mehroom ka haq hai.
To yateem par sakhti na karo. Aur sawal karne wale ko mat jhidko.
Jo log apna maal raat aur din, posheeda aur zahir mein kharch karte hain, unke liye unke Rab ke paas unka ajr hai. Aur un par na koi khauf hoga aur na woh ghamgeen honge.
Shaitan tumhe faqeeri se darata hai aur behayai ka hukum deta hai, jabke Allah tumse apni taraf se maghfirat aur fazl ka wada karta hai. Aur Allah bahut vus'at wala, sab kuch jaanne wala hai.
Aur jo kuch bhi tum kharch karte ho, Woh uski jagah (aur dekar) pura kar deta hai. Aur Woh sab se behtareen rizq dene wala hai.

Aye Nabi, unke maal mein se sadqa lo, iske zariye tum unhe paak karoge aur unka tazkiya karoge, aur unke liye dua karo. Beshak, tumhari duaein unke liye taskeen ka baais hain. Aur Allah sunne wala, jaanne wala hai.

Neki sirf ye nahi ke tum apne chehre mashriq aur maghrib ki taraf pher lo, balke asal neki to yeh hai ke koi Allah par imaan laye... aur maal, uski muhabbat ke bawajood, rishtedaron, yateemon, miskeenon, musafiron, maangne walon aur ghulamon ko azaad karne par kharch kare.
Aur na apna haath apni gardan se bandha hua rakho aur na use bilkul hi khol do, ke phir malamat-zada aur thaka-haara hokar baith jao.
Bhala tumne us shakhs ko dekha jo jaza aur saza ke din ko jhutlata hai? Yeh wahi hai jo yateem ko dhakke deta hai, aur miskeen ko khana khilane ki targheeb nahi deta.
Beshak sadqa dene wale mard aur sadqa dene wali auratein aur (woh jinhone) Allah ko qarz-e-hasana diya, unke liye (ajr) kayi guna badha diya jayega, aur unke liye izzat wala ajr hai.

Agar tum apne sadqat ko zahir karo to woh bhi acha hai; lekin agar tum unhe posheeda rakho aur faqeeron ko do to yeh tumhare liye behtar hai, aur Woh tumhare kuch gunahon ko mita dega. Aur Allah, jo kuch tum karte ho, usse (poori tarah) waqif hai.
Aur neki aur parhezgari mein ek doosre ki madad karo, aur gunah aur zulm mein ek doosre ki madad na karo.

To jitni tum mein taqat ho Allah se daro, aur suno aur ita'at karo aur kharch karo; yeh tumhare liye behtar hai. Aur jo shakhs apne nafs ke bukhl se bacha liya gaya, to wahi log kamyab hone wale hain.
Aur tumhein kya maloom ke woh mushkil ghaati kya hai? Woh hai kisi gardan (ghulam) ko azaad karna, ya sakht bhook ke din mein khana khilana, kisi yateem rishtedar ko, ya khaak-nasheen miskeen ko.
Aye imaan walon, un paak cheezon mein se kharch karo jo tumne kamai hain aur us mein se jo Humne tumhare liye zameen se nikala hai.
Aur jo kuch tum zakat mein dete ho, Allah ki raza chahte hue - to wahi log (apna maal) badhane wale hain.

Lekin parhezgar usse bacha liya jayega - jo apna maal (kharch karke) paakizgi haasil karta hai, aur uske zehen mein kisi ka koi ehsan nahi hota jiska badla talab kiya jaye, siwaye apne Rab, Buland-o-Bala ki raza talash karne ke. Aur woh anqareeb raazi ho jayega.
Aur rishtedar ko uska haq do, aur miskeen ko, aur musafir ko, aur fuzool kharchi na karo.
Allah sood ko har barkat se mehroom kar dega, lekin sadqat ke aamal ke liye (barkat) badhayega.
Aur jo kuch Allah ne tumhe diya hai usse aakhirat ka ghar talash karo, aur duniya mein se apna hissa na bhoolo. Aur (logon par) ehsan karo jaise Allah ne tum par ehsan kiya hai.
Meri rehmat har cheez par haavi hai. To main use un logon ke liye likh dunga jo parhezgari ikhtiyar karte hain aur zakat dete hain aur un logon ke liye jo Hamari nishaniyon par imaan rakhte hain.

Beshak, insaan be-sabar paida kiya gaya hai: Jab use takleef pahunchti hai to ghabra uthta hai, aur jab use bhalai pahunchti hai to (use) rokne lagta hai. Siwaye namaz padhne walon ke... Aur woh jinke maal mein ek muqarrar haq hai, maangne wale aur mehroom ke liye.

Woh tumse puchte hain, [Aye Muhammad], ke woh kya kharch karein. Keh do, 'Jo kuch bhi tum bhalai mein se kharch karo, woh walidain, rishtedaron, yateemon, miskeenon aur musafiron ke liye hai. Aur jo kuch bhi tum neki karte ho - beshak, Allah usse khoob waqif hai.'
Allah aur Uske Rasool par imaan lao aur us maal mein se kharch karo jiska Usne tumhe waris banaya hai. Pas jo log tum mein se imaan laye aur kharch kiya, unke liye bada ajr hai.
Aur jo kuch tum Allah ki raah mein kharch karoge, woh tumhe poora poora lauta diya jayega, aur tum par zulm nahi kiya jayega.
Jo log apna maal raat aur din mein, posheeda aur zahir taur par kharch karte hain - unke liye unke Rab ke paas unka ajr hai. Aur un par koi khauf na hoga aur na woh ghamgeen honge.

Aur yeh woh log hain jo apne Rab ki khushi haasil karne ke liye sabr karte hain, aur namaz qayam karte hain, aur jo kuch Humne unhe rizq diya hai usme se posheeda aur zahir taur par kharch karte hain, aur burai ko bhalai se door karte hain. Aise logon ke liye hi aakhirat ka (behtareen) ghar hai.

Aur tum mein se jo fazeelat aur maali vus'at wale hain, woh apne rishtedaron, miskeenon aur Allah ki raah mein hijrat karne walon ko (maal) na dene ki qasam na khayein, aur unhe maaf kar dein aur darguzar karein. Kya tum yeh pasand nahi karte ke Allah tumhe maaf kar de? Aur Allah bahut bakshne wala, nihayat meharban hai.
Aur Humne unhe peshwa banaya jo Hamare hukum se hidayat dete the. Aur Humne unhe neki ke kaam karne, namaz qayam karne aur zakat dene ki Wahi ki; aur woh Hamari hi ibadat karne wale the.
Shab-e-Qadr hazaar mahino se behtar hai.
To unhe is Ghar ke Rab ki ibadat karni chahiye, Jisne unhe bhook se (bacha kar) khilaya aur khauf se (bacha kar) aman diya.

Sadqa un faqeeron ke liye hai jo Allah ki raah mein rok diye gaye hain, zameen mein chal phir nahi sakte. Ek na-waqif (shakhs) unhe unke parhez ki wajah se ameer samjhega. Tum unhe unki nishani se pehchan loge. Woh logon se israr se nahi maangte. Aur jo kuch bhi tum bhalai mein se kharch karte ho - beshak Allah use khoob jaanne wala hai.
To jab tum (apne farayiz se) farigh ho jao, to (ibadat ke liye) khade ho jao. Aur apne Rab ki taraf hi (apni) raghbat karo.
Aur (woh) Allah, Azeem par imaan nahi rakhta tha, aur miskeen ko khana khilane ki targheeb nahi deta tha.
Beshak, woh shakhs kamyab ho gaya jisne (zakat aur sadqa dekar) apna tazkiya kiya.
Duniya ki zindagi to sirf dhoke ka samaan hai.
Afsoos hai un namaziyon par, jo apni namaz se ghafil hain; woh jo dikhawa karte hain, lekin doosron ko mamuli si madad dene se bhi inkar karte hain.
Aur namaz qayam karo aur zakat do aur Rasool ki ita'at karo taake tum par reham kiya jaye.
Jo shakhs apne nafs ke lalach se bacha liya gaya, to wahi log kamyab hone wale hain.
Jin logon ne neki ki, unke liye (behtareen) sila hai aur usse bhi zyada.
Aur zameen par koi bhi makhlooq aisi nahi jiska rizq Allah ke zimme na ho, aur Woh uske theherne ki jagah aur uske sipurda-gah ko jaanta hai. Sab kuch ek wazeh kitaab mein hai.
Beshak, mera Rab jiske liye chahta hai rizq mein wus'at deta hai aur (jiske liye chahta hai) tang kar deta hai. Lekin aksar log nahi jaante.
Kya neki ka badla neki ke siwa kuch aur hai?
Aur sabr karo, kyun ke beshak Allah neki karne walon ka ajr zaya nahi karta.
Aur jo kuch Humne unhe rizq diya hai us mein se (khairaat mein) kharch karte hain.
Jo mard aur auratein sadqa dete hain, aur Allah ko qarz-e-hasana dete hain, unke liye (ajr) kayi guna badha diya jayega, aur unke liye (iske alawa) ek azeem ajr hoga.

hadith.text: Rasool Allah (ﷺ) sab logon se zyada sakhi the, aur Ramzan mein jab Jibril (A.S.) unse milte the to woh sab se zyada sakhi ho jate the. Jibril (A.S.) Ramzan ki har raat mein unse mil kar Quran ka daur karte the, aur Rasool Allah (ﷺ) neki ke kaamo mein tez hawa se bhi zyada sakhi the.
Jo kisi rozadar ko iftar karwaye to usko bhi utna hi sawab milega jitna rozadar ko, aur rozadar ke sawab mein se kuch bhi kam nahi kiya jayega.

Jab insaan mar jata hai to uske aamal ka silsila khatam ho jata hai siwaye teen cheezon ke: Sadqa-e-Jariya (hamesha jari rehne wala sadqa); woh ilm jisse faida uthaya jaye, ya neik aulaad jo uske liye dua kare.
Jahannum ki aag se bacho, chahe ek khajoor ka tukda sadqa de kar hi sahi.

Sadqa maal ko kam nahi karta, koi shakhs doosre ko maaf nahi karta magar Allah uski izzat badha deta hai, aur koi shakhs Allah ki khatir tawazo ikhtiyar nahi karta magar Allah uska darja buland kar deta hai.
Qayamat ke din momin ka saaya uska sadqa hoga.

Har roz jab suraj tulu hota hai to har insaan ke har jod par ek sadqa wajib hota hai: do logon ke darmiyan insaf karna sadqa hai; kisi aadmi ki uske sawari ke maamle mein madad karna, use us par sawaar karna ya uska saaman us par ladwana, sadqa hai...
Upar wala haath neeche wale haath se behtar hai. Upar wala haath woh hai jo deta hai, aur neeche wala haath woh hai jo leta hai.
Main aur woh shakhs jo yateem ki dekhbhal karta hai aur uski kifalat karta hai, Jannat mein is tarah honge,' (aur aap ne) apni shahadat ki aur darmiyani ungli ko milaya.
Har neki ka kaam sadqa hai.
Sadqa dene mein deri na karo, kyun ke yeh museebat ke raaste mein rukawat ban kar khada ho jata hai.
Sab se afzal sadqa paani pilana hai.
Woh momin nahi jo khud to pait bhar kar khaye jabke uske barabar wala padosi bhooka ho.
Logon mein sab se behtar woh hain jo logon ko sab se zyada faida pohchate hain.
Insaan ki asli daulat woh neki hai jo woh is duniya mein karta hai.
Jo shakhs bewa aur miskeen ki dekhbhal karta hai, woh Allah ki raah mein jihad karne wale ki tarah hai, ya us shakhs ki tarah jo din bhar roza rakhta hai aur raat bhar namaz mein khada rehta hai.
Kisi bhi zinda makhlooq ki khidmat karne ka sawab hai.
Apne bhai ke chehre par muskurana bhi ek sadqa hai.
Allah apne bande ki madad mein rehta hai jab tak banda apne bhai ki madad mein rehta hai.
Jo shakhs kisi momin ki duniya ki pareshaniyon mein se koi pareshani door karega, Allah qayamat ki mushkilaat mein se uski ek mushkil ko door kar dega.
Ek woh aadmi jise Allah ne daulat di aur woh use sahi raaste mein kharch karta hai...
Aye Ibn-e-Adam, kharch kar, aur main tujh par kharch karunga.
Musalman ka sadqa uske liye qabr ki garmi ko thanda karta hai, aur momin qayamat ke din apne sadqe ke saaye mein hoga.
Jo shakhs bewa aur zarooratmand ki kifalat ke liye koshish karta hai, woh us shakhs ki tarah hai jo Allah ki raah mein jihad karta hai.
Ek aadmi ka apne ghar walon par kharch karna sadqa hai.
Apna maal (sadqa karne se) na roko, kahin aisa na ho ke Allah tumse (apni naimatein) rok le.
Har musalman ko sadqa dena lazim hai... Use apne haathon se kaam karna chahiye aur khud ko faida pohchana chahiye aur sadqa bhi dena chahiye.
Sab se behtareen sadqa woh hai jo ek maaldar shakhs de. Aur sab se pehle apne ahl-o-ayal par kharch karna shuru karo.
Agar tum mein se koi Qayamat ke din ki badi pareshani se mehfooz rehna chahta hai, to use tangdast shakhs ko mohlat deni chahiye ya uska qarz maaf kar dena chahiye.
Ek aadmi ka apni zindagi mein ek dirham sadqa karna, uske marne ke waqt sau dirham sadqa karne se behtar hai.
Ek meetha bol bhi sadqa hai.
Jo shakhs ek darakht lagata hai aur usse koi insaan ya janwar khata hai, to yeh uske liye sadqa hai.
Mominon ki aapas mein muhabbat, rehamdili aur hamdardi ki misaal ek jism ki si hai. Jab koi hissa dukhta hai to poora jism be-khwabi aur bukhar se react karta hai.
Jo shakhs pait bhar kar soye jabke uska padosi bhooka ho, woh hum mein se nahi.
Allah un logon par reham nahi karega jo insaniyat par reham nahi karte.
Allah ke nazdeek sab se zyada pasandeeda aamal woh hain jo hamesha kiye jayein, chahe woh thode hi kyun na hon.
Jo shakhs Allah ke liye masjid banata hai, Allah uske liye Jannat mein waisa hi ghar banata hai.
Sadqa dene se aadmi ka maal kam nahi hoga.
Allah se daro aur apne bachon ke darmiyan insaf karo.
Sadqa gunahon ko is tarah bujha deta hai jaise paani aag ko bujha deta hai.
Allah ke nazdeek sab se zyada pasandeeda jaghein masjidein hain, aur Allah ke nazdeek sab se zyada na-pasandeeda jaghein bazaar hain.
Kisi bhi neki ke kaam ko haqeer na samjho, chahe woh apne bhai se khanda peshani se milna hi kyun na ho.
Koi shakhs aisa nahi jo apni paak kamai se sadqa de - aur Allah sirf paak maal hi qubool karta hai - magar Rehman use apne dahine haath se leta hai.
Reham karne walon par Rahman reham karega. Zameen walon par reham karo aur Aasman wala tum par reham karega.
Jo shakhs ilm ka raasta talash karta hai, Allah uske liye Jannat ka raasta aasan kar deta hai.
Tum mein sab se behtar woh hai jo apne ghar walon ke liye sab se behtar hai.
Jiske dil mein rai ke daane ke barabar bhi takabbur hoga, woh Jannat mein dakhil nahi hoga.
Jo shakhs Islam mein koi acha tareeqa ijaad karta hai, use iska sawab milega aur un logon ka bhi sawab milega jo uske baad is par amal karenge, unke sawab mein se kuch bhi kam kiye baghair.
Zakat Islam ka pul hai.
Tum mein sab se behtar woh hain jo apne qarz ada karne mein sab se behtar hain.
Ek musalman doosre musalman ka bhai hai, to use us par zulm nahi karna chahiye, na hi use kisi zaalim ke hawale karna chahiye.
Jab Ramzan ka mahina shuru hota hai to jannat ke darwaze khol diye jaate hain aur jahannum ke darwaze band kar diye jaate hain aur shaitano ko zanjeeron mein jakad diya jaata hai.
Neki ke kaamo mein se utna hi karo jitna tum kar sakte ho, kyun ke behtareen aamal woh hain jo hamesha kiye jayein, chahe woh thode hi kyun na hon.
Tum mein se jo koi burai dekhe to use apne haath se badal de; agar iski taqat na ho to apni zabaan se; aur agar iski bhi taqat na ho to apne dil se; aur yeh imaan ka kamzor tareen darja hai.
Beshak, aamal ka daromadar niyaton par hai, aur har aadmi ko wahi milega jiski usne niyat ki.
